title: I Feel Love
album: Endless Summer (Donna Summer's Greatest Hits) [European Version]
why_this_song: I Feel Love by Donna Summer (1977) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 26 times; first heard in: "Ooh I feel love, I feel love"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Ooh it's so good, it's so good"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Ooh it's so good, it's so good"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Ooh fall and free, fall and free"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Ooh fall and free, fall and free"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "feel" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "feel" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "it's" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "it's" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Ooh it's so good, it's so good
Fall and free, fall and free
Ooh, I got you, I got you

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: It's so good, it's so good
I feel love, I feel love
Ooh, What you do, what you do

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Donna Summer one question about "I Feel Love", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Donna Summer sobre "I Feel Love", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "I Feel Love" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "I Feel Love" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "I Feel Love" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "I Feel Love" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
